parameters.description: Fixed temperature change from reference (degrees C). Positive = heating.

parameters.description: Reference temperature for input spectra (degrees C)

parameters.description: Change in water activity from reference (0-1 scale)

parameters.name: moisture_content

nodes.name: YOutlierFilter
nodes.description: Filter samples with outlier target (y) values

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Detection threshold. IQR: multiplies IQR (1.5=mild, 3.0=extreme). Z-score: number of std deviations (3.0 is common). MAD: commonly 3.5.

parameters.name: lower_percentile
parameters.description: Lower percentile cutoff (only used with percentile method)

parameters.name: upper_percentile
parameters.description: Upper percentile cutoff (only used with percentile method)

nodes.name: XOutlierFilter
nodes.description: Filter samples with outlier spectral features

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Detection threshold. If null, uses method-specific defaults (e.g., 3.0 for Mahalanobis, auto for PCA). Not used by isolation_forest/lof.

parameters.name: n_components
parameters.description: Number of PCA components for PCA-based methods, or dimensionality reduction for Mahalanobis. If null, auto-determined.

parameters.name: contamination
parameters.description: Expected proportion of outliers (used by isolation_forest and lof methods)

parameters.name: random_state
parameters.description: Random state for reproducibility (used by isolation_forest and robust_mahalanobis)

nodes.name: SpectralQualityFilter
nodes.description: Filter samples with poor spectral quality

parameters.name: max_nan_ratio
parameters.description: Maximum allowed ratio of NaN values per spectrum (0-1). Default 0.1 = 10%.

parameters.name: max_zero_ratio
parameters.description: Maximum allowed ratio of zero values per spectrum (0-1). Default 0.5 = 50%.

parameters.name: min_variance
parameters.description: Minimum variance threshold. Samples below this are excluded (flat spectra).

parameters.name: max_value
parameters.description: Maximum allowed value in spectrum. Samples with any value above this are excluded (saturation detection). Null = no limit.

parameters.name: min_value
parameters.description: Minimum allowed value in spectrum. Samples with any value below this are excluded. Null = no limit.

parameters.name: check_inf
parameters.description: Whether to check for and exclude samples containing infinite values.

nodes.name: HighLeverageFilter
nodes.description: Filter high-leverage samples that may unduly influence models

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Leverage computation method. 'hat' works well when n_samples > n_features. 'pca' is better for high-dimensional spectral data.

parameters.name: threshold_multiplier
parameters.description: Multiple of average leverage used as threshold. Common values: 2.0 (lenient), 3.0 (strict).

parameters.name: absolute_threshold
parameters.description: Absolute leverage threshold (0-1). If set, overrides threshold_multiplier.

parameters.name: n_components
parameters.description: Number of PCA components for 'pca' method. If null, auto-determined.

parameters.name: center
parameters.description: Whether to center the data before computing leverage. Recommended.

nodes.name: MetadataFilter
nodes.description: Filter samples based on metadata column values

parameters.name: column
parameters.description: Name of the metadata column to filter on

parameters.name: values_to_exclude
parameters.description: List of values to exclude. Samples with these values are removed.

parameters.name: values_to_keep
parameters.description: List of values to keep. Only samples with these values are retained.

parameters.name: exclude_missing
parameters.description: Whether to exclude samples with missing/null values in the column.

nodes.name: ChooseOne
nodes.description: Generator: try one item from a list

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: List of items to choose from (preprocessing steps, models, etc.)

nodes.name: ChooseN
nodes.description: Generator: choose N items from a list

parameters.name: items
parameters.description: List of items to choose from

parameters.name: n_neighbors
parameters.description: Number of neighbors for local model

nodes.name: IntervalPLS
nodes.description: Interval PLS for spectral band selection

parameters.name: lags
parameters.description: Number of lags for domain invariance

parameters.name: n_orth
parameters.description: Number of orthogonal components to remove

parameters.name: n_orth
parameters.description: Number of orthogonal components to remove

parameters.name: auto_select
parameters.description: Automatically select best operator per component

parameters.name: auto_select
parameters.description: Automatically select best operator per component

parameters.name: n_estimators
parameters.description: Number of trees in the forest

parameters.name: min_samples_split
parameters.description: Minimum samples required to split a node

parameters.name: min_samples_leaf
parameters.description: Minimum samples required at a leaf node

parameters.name: max_features
parameters.description: Number of features to consider for best split

parameters.name: n_estimators
parameters.description: Number of trees in the forest

parameters.name: min_samples_split
parameters.description: Minimum samples required to split a node

parameters.name: min_samples_leaf
parameters.description: Minimum samples required at a leaf node

parameters.name: max_features
parameters.description: Number of features to consider for best split

parameters.name: min_child_weight
parameters.description: Minimum sum of instance weight in a child

parameters.name: num_leaves
parameters.description: Maximum number of leaves in one tree

parameters.name: max_depth
parameters.description: Max tree depth (-1 for no limit)

parameters.name: min_child_samples
parameters.description: Minimum number of data in one leaf

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Whether to scale X and Y

nodes.description: Nonlinear PLS using Kernel Methods (Kernel PLS / NL-PLS).

nodes.name: OKLMPLS
nodes.description: Online Koopman Latent-Mode Partial Least Squares (OKLM-PLS).

nodes.description: Stack of estimators with a final classifier.

nodes.name: StackingRegressor
nodes.description: Stack of estimators with a final regressor.

nodes.name: VotingClassifier
nodes.description: Soft Voting/Majority Rule classifier for unfitted estimators.

nodes.name: VotingRegressor
nodes.description: Prediction voting regressor for unfitted estimators.

nodes.name: GaussianProcessClassifier
nodes.description: Gaussian process classification (GPC) based on Laplace approximation.

nodes.name: ElasticNetCV
nodes.description: Elastic Net model with iterative fitting along a regularization path.

nodes.name: GammaRegressor
nodes.description: Generalized Linear Model with a Gamma distribution.

nodes.description: Lasso model fit with Least Angle Regression a.k.a. Lars.

nodes.description: Cross-validated Lasso, using the LARS algorithm.

nodes.name: LassoLarsIC
nodes.description: Lasso model fit with Lars using BIC or AIC for model selection.

nodes.name: LogisticRegressionCV
nodes.description: Logistic Regression CV (aka logit, MaxEnt) classifier.

nodes.name: MultiTaskElasticNet
nodes.description: Multi-task ElasticNet model trained with L1/L2 mixed-norm as regularizer.

nodes.name: MultiTaskElasticNetCV
nodes.description: Multi-task L1/L2 ElasticNet with built-in cross-validation.

nodes.name: MultiTaskLasso
nodes.description: Multi-task Lasso model trained with L1/L2 mixed-norm as regularizer.

nodes.name: MultiTaskLassoCV
nodes.description: Multi-task Lasso model trained with L1/L2 mixed-norm as regularizer.

nodes.name: PoissonRegressor
nodes.description: Generalized Linear Model with a Poisson distribution.

nodes.name: QuantileRegressor
nodes.description: Linear regression model that predicts conditional quantiles.

nodes.name: SGDClassifier
nodes.description: Linear classifiers (SVM, logistic regression, etc.) with SGD training.

nodes.name: SGDRegressor
nodes.description: Linear model fitted by minimizing a regularized empirical loss with SGD.

nodes.name: TheilSenRegressor
nodes.description: Theil-Sen Estimator: robust multivariate regression model.

nodes.name: TweedieRegressor
nodes.description: Generalized Linear Model with a Tweedie distribution.

nodes.name: ClassifierChain
nodes.description: A multi-label model that arranges binary classifiers into a chain.

nodes.name: RegressorChain
nodes.description: A multi-label model that arranges regressions into a chain.

nodes.name: CalibratedClassifierCV
nodes.description: Calibrate probabilities using isotonic, sigmoid, or temperature scaling.

nodes.name: TunedThresholdClassifierCV
nodes.description: Classifier that post-tunes the decision threshold using cross-validation.

nodes.name: BernoulliNB
nodes.description: Naive Bayes classifier for multivariate Bernoulli models.

nodes.name: CategoricalNB
nodes.description: Naive Bayes classifier for categorical features.

nodes.name: ComplementNB
nodes.description: The Complement Naive Bayes classifier described in Rennie et al. (2003).

nodes.name: MultinomialNB
nodes.description: Naive Bayes classifier for multinomial models.

nodes.name: KNeighborsClassifier
nodes.description: Classifier implementing the k-nearest neighbors vote.

nodes.name: RadiusNeighborsClassifier
nodes.description: Classifier implementing a vote among neighbors within a given radius.

nodes.name: RadiusNeighborsRegressor
nodes.description: Regression based on neighbors within a fixed radius.

parameters.name: decreasing
parameters.description: Whether to use decreasing window size

nodes.name: BEADS
nodes.description: Baseline Estimation And Denoising with Sparsity.

nodes.name: IASLS
nodes.description: Improved Asymmetric Least Squares baseline correction.

nodes.name: FractionToPercent
nodes.description: Convert fractional [0, 1] values to percentage [0, 100] range.

nodes.name: PercentToFraction
nodes.description: Convert percentage values to fractional [0, 1] range.

parameters.name: window_length
parameters.description: Size of the moving window (must be odd)

parameters.name: polyorder
parameters.description: Polynomial order for fitting (must be less than window_length)

parameters.name: delta
parameters.description: Spacing of the samples to which the filter is applied

parameters.name: n_components
parameters.description: Number of principal components to keep

parameters.name: whiten
parameters.description: Whiten components to have unit variance

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: End index for cropping (-1 for end)

nodes.name: FlattenPreprocessing
nodes.description: Flatten the preprocessing dimension of a 3D feature array.

parameters.name: n_pls_components
parameters.description: Number of PLS components for variable importance

parameters.name: subset_ratio

parameters.name: subset_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of samples used in each iteration

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: VIP score threshold for variable selection

nodes.name: FlexibleSVD
nodes.description: Truncated SVD with flexible component specification.

parameters.name: with_mean
parameters.description: Center spectra by subtracting the mean

parameters.name: with_std
parameters.description: Scale spectra by dividing by the standard deviation

parameters.name: ddof
parameters.description: Delta degrees of freedom for std calculation (0=population, 1=sample)

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: Consistency constant for MAD (1.4826 for normal distribution)

parameters.name: n_components
parameters.description: Number of orthogonal components to remove

nodes.name: StandardScaler
nodes.description: Standardize to zero mean, unit variance

parameters.name: with_mean
parameters.description: Center data by subtracting the mean

parameters.name: with_std
parameters.description: Scale data by dividing by the standard deviation

parameters.name: with_centering
parameters.description: Center data by subtracting the median

parameters.name: with_scaling
parameters.description: Scale data by the interquartile range

parameters.description: Scale to unit variance after IQR scaling

nodes.name: KNeighborsTransformer
nodes.description: Transform X into a (weighted) graph of k nearest neighbors.

nodes.name: RadiusNeighborsTransformer
nodes.description: Transform X into a (weighted) graph of neighbors nearer than a radius.

nodes.name: FastICA
nodes.description: FastICA: a fast algorithm for Independent Component Analysis.

nodes.name: LatentDirichletAllocation
nodes.description: Latent Dirichlet Allocation with online variational Bayes algorithm.

nodes.name: LabelBinarizer
nodes.description: Binarize labels in a one-vs-all fashion.

nodes.name: LabelEncoder
nodes.description: Encode target labels with value between 0 and n_classes-1.

nodes.name: MultiLabelBinarizer
nodes.description: Transform between iterable of iterables and a multilabel format.

nodes.name: OneHotEncoder
nodes.description: Encode categorical features as a one-hot numeric array.

nodes.name: OrdinalEncoder
nodes.description: Encode categorical features as an integer array.

nodes.name: TargetEncoder
nodes.description: Target Encoder for regression and classification targets.

nodes.name: DictVectorizer
nodes.description: Transforms lists of feature-value mappings to vectors.

nodes.name: FeatureHasher
nodes.description: Implements feature hashing, aka the hashing trick.

nodes.name: HashingVectorizer
nodes.description: Convert a collection of text documents to a matrix of token occurrences.

nodes.name: PatchExtractor
nodes.description: Extracts patches from a collection of images.

nodes.name: TfidfTransformer
nodes.description: Transform a count matrix to a normalized tf or tf-idf representation.

nodes.name: GenericUnivariateSelect
nodes.description: Univariate feature selector with configurable strategy.

nodes.name: RFE
nodes.description: Feature ranking with recursive feature elimination.

nodes.name: RFECV
nodes.description: Recursive feature elimination with cross-validation to select features.

nodes.name: SelectFdr
nodes.description: Filter: Select the p-values for an estimated false discovery rate.

nodes.name: SelectFpr
nodes.description: Filter: Select the pvalues below alpha based on a FPR test.

nodes.name: SelectFromModel
nodes.description: Meta-transformer for selecting features based on importance weights.

nodes.name: SelectFwe
nodes.description: Filter: Select the p-values corresponding to Family-wise error rate.

nodes.name: SelectKBest
nodes.description: Select features according to the k highest scores.

nodes.name: SelectPercentile
nodes.description: Select features according to a percentile of the highest scores.

nodes.name: SequentialFeatureSelector
nodes.description: Transformer that performs Sequential Feature Selection.

nodes.name: VarianceThreshold
nodes.description: Feature selector that removes all low-variance features.

nodes.name: KNNImputer
nodes.description: Imputation for completing missing values using k-Nearest Neighbors.

nodes.name: SimpleImputer
nodes.description: Univariate imputer for completing missing values with simple strategies.

nodes.name: AdditiveChi2Sampler
nodes.description: Approximate feature map for additive chi2 kernel.

nodes.name: GaussianRandomProjection
nodes.description: Reduce dimensionality through Gaussian random projection.

nodes.name: Nystroem
nodes.description: Approximate a kernel map using a subset of the training data.

nodes.name: PolynomialCountSketch
nodes.description: Polynomial kernel approximation via Tensor Sketch.

nodes.description: Approximate feature map for "skewed chi-squared" kernel.

nodes.description: Reduce dimensionality through sparse random projection.

nodes.description: Applies transformers to columns of an array or pandas DataFrame.

nodes.description: Concatenates results of multiple transformer objects.

nodes.name: RandomTreesEmbedding
nodes.description: An ensemble of totally random trees.

nodes.name: Binarizer
nodes.description: Binarize data (set feature values to 0 or 1) according to a threshold.

nodes.name: FunctionTransformer
nodes.description: Constructs a transformer from an arbitrary callable.

nodes.name: Normalizer
nodes.description: Normalize samples individually to unit norm.

nodes.name: SplineTransformer
nodes.description: Generate univariate B-spline bases for features.

parameters.name: window_size
parameters.description: Size of the moving window (should be odd)

parameters.name: n_components
parameters.description: Number of PCA components to retain

nodes.name: StandardScaler
nodes.description: Standardize target to zero mean, unit variance

parameters.name: with_mean
parameters.description: Center target by subtracting the mean

parameters.name: with_std
parameters.description: Scale target by dividing by the standard deviation

nodes.name: RobustScaler
nodes.description: Scale target using statistics robust to outliers

parameters.description: Center target by subtracting the median

parameters.name: with_scaling
parameters.description: Scale target by the interquartile range

nodes.name: QuantileTransformer
nodes.description: Transform to uniform or normal distribution

nodes.name: IntegerKBinsDiscretizer
nodes.description: KBinsDiscretizer qui retourne des entiers au lieu de floats

nodes.name: MaxAbsScaler
nodes.description: Scale target by maximum absolute value

parameters.name: threshold
parameters.description: Values above threshold are mapped to 1, below to 0
